ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apis" (
  "api_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each API */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the API */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the API */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the API */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the API (e.g., Draft, Active, Retired) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the API */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the providers table to link the API to its provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apis_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the provider's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., API Creator, Publisher, Administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "api_id" TEXT /* ID of the API the access control applies to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access control applies to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Read, Write, Execute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was last updated */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date for the access control entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_api_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_id") REFERENCES apis ("api_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_headers" (
  "header_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request header */,
  "api_id" TEXT /* ID of the API the request header applies to */,
  "header_name" TEXT /* Name of the request header (e.g., If-Match, If-Unmodified-Since) */,
  "header_value" TEXT /* Value of the request header */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request header was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request header was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("header_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_headers_api_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_id") REFERENCES apis ("api_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifecycle_checklist_items" (
  "checklist_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checklist item */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifecycle action the item applies to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the checklist item (e.g., Deprecate Old Versions, Require Re-Subscription) */,
  "item_value" TEXT /* Value of the checklist item (e.g., true, false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the checklist item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the checklist item was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the checklist item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checklist_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API version */,
  "api_id" TEXT /* ID of the API the version applies to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the API */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API version (e.g., Draft, Active, Retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_versions_api_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_id") REFERENCES apis ("api_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API deployment */,
  "api_id" TEXT /* ID of the API the deployment applies to */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the API was deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment the API was deployed to (e.g., Production, Staging) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was last updated */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who performed the deployment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Deployment status (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_deployments_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_deployments_api_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_id") REFERENCES apis ("api_id")
)
